summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of Bariatric & Metabolic Surgery Educational Hub completed. All core functionality working perfectly including health calculator, risk zone logic, lead capture, and admin dashboard. Previous 422 validation error resolved.

design_issues.issue: Missing 'Journey Timeline' section - only Treatment Pathways and Comorbidity Resolution sections are present

passed_tests: Backend API health assessment calculation (Green zone: BMI 25.1, no comorbidities)
Backend API health assessment calculation (Yellow zone: BMI 29.3, with diabetes)
Backend API health assessment calculation (Red zone: BMI 34.6, with comorbidities)
Comorbidity statistics API endpoint with proper data structure
Weight loss projection API endpoint with proper data structure
Homepage CTA button opens calculator modal
Complete calculator flow: Step 1 (metrics) → Step 2 (comorbidities) → Step 3 (confirmation) → Results
Green zone logic: No lead form shown for BMI <27.5 without comorbidities
Yellow zone logic: Lead form shown for BMI 27.5-32.4 with comorbidities
Red zone logic: Lead form shown for BMI ≥32.5
Lead capture form submission for Yellow and Red zones
Admin dashboard displays captured leads with complete information
Data visualizations: Comorbidity resolution pie chart using Recharts
Data visualizations: Weight loss comparison line chart using Recharts
Type conversion and null handling for optional fields
